data.title: iQIYI to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 18, 2026
data.description: On April 23, 2026, iQIYI, Inc. (NASDAQ: IQ), a prominent online entertainment video services provider in China, shared plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The report is scheduled to be released before the U.S. market commences on May 18, 2026.

data.title: Fortuna Reports 15% Increase YoY in Consolidated Mineral Reserves and updates estimate of Sunbird deposit, Séguéla
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Fortuna Mining Corp. (NYSE: FSM | TSX: FVI) has released new data on its Mineral Reserve and Mineral Resource estimates for its mines and projects in West Africa and Latin America. The company saw a 15% increase in Mineral Reserves year-over-year despite production-related depletion. As of March 31, 2026, the estimate for Séguéla revealed a 34% rise in underground Mineral Reserves and a 55% boost in Inferred Mineral Resources at the Sunbird deposit, following successful drilling programs in late 2025. All figures mentioned are in US dollars, unless stated otherwise.

data.title: Labubu Dolls discovered with cotton from Xinjiang region, banned by US law. New York Times test revealed the issue.
data.description: An examination conducted by The New York Times confirmed that garments for certain viral dolls were found to contain cotton originating from the Xinjiang region of China. This type of cotton is prohibited in the United States.

data.description: Announced today in Qingdao, China, Hisense, a prominent player in the consumer electronics and home appliances industry, unveiled its newest premium television collection, the UR9 Series. This launch signifies a fresh perspective on technology and innovation. The UR9 Series is set for a global release.

data.title: OZMOSI Announces Strategic Partnership with Planview to Advance AI-Driven Planning in Pharmaceutical R&D
data.description: A major breakthrough has been made in the pharmaceutical industry with the collaboration of structured clinical intelligence and AI-driven portfolio planning. This partnership offers pharmaceutical teams a more efficient and definitive method to make crucial research and development decisions. The cutting-edge approach is set to revolutionize the industry by providing faster and clearer insights. The development was announced in Spring Lake Heights, N.J. on April 23, 2026, opening new avenues for companies to optimize their decision-making processes. OZMOSI, renowned for its structured expertise in the field, is spearheading this initiative to transform the landscape of drug development. This collaboration is poised to significantly impact R&D strategies, potentially leading to accelerated innovation and improved outcomes. It presents an unprecedented opportunity for pharmaceutical entities to enhance their productivity and competitiveness in a rapidly evolving market.

data.title: NVIDIA's Megatron with Muon Optimizer boosts LLM training with near-equal throughput to AdamW. #tech #innovation
data.description: NVIDIA has incorporated Muon and advanced optimizers into Megatron to improve large-scale Large Language Model (LLM) training. This enhancement has led to nearly equal throughput levels to AdamW.

data.title: GAC INTERNATIONAL and ALLUR Group Sign KD Production Industrial Cooperation Agreement to Advance Localized Production and Deepen Strategic Presence in the CIS Market
data.description: In April 2026, GAC INTERNATIONAL and ALLUR Group, a major automotive manufacturing and distribution company in Kazakhstan, formally inked a KD production industrial cooperation deal in Guangzhou. This partnership was established in February 2026 and marks a significant collaboration between the two entities. Chen Jiacai, Vice President of GAC INTERNATIONAL, played a key role in finalizing this agreement.

data.title: $37K awarded to traders on Polymarket due to Paris weather data glitch, sparking doubt. Meteorologist suspects unusual temp spike at Charles de Gaulle Airport.
data.description: Meteorologist Ruben Hallali shared with French media outlet BFMTV that the rapid temperature change detected at a weather station in Charles de Gaulle Airport was probably not a natural occurrence.

data.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On April 23? Here's How Traders Lean After Record Session
data.description: The S&P 500 had a strong day on Wednesday, increasing by 1.05% to reach a new record high of 7,137.90. This rise was fueled by improving market sentiment due to reduced geopolitical concerns and positive earnings reports. Conversely, sentiment in the Polymarket crowd, centered around the Polygon-based cryptocurrency POL, has taken a bearish turn as Thursday approaches. In the market for April 23, only around 13% of traders are betting on the index to rise, with the majority predicting a lower opening for the benchmark index. This shift in sentiment is notable given Wednesday's rally, which pushed the S&P 500 to fresh all-time highs amidst optimism surrounding a potential ceasefire extension between the U.S. and Iran and a strong start to the earnings season. Despite this, unresolved geopolitical tensions persist, with Iran showing hesitance towards negotiations and reports of container ship seizures in the Strait of Hormuz raising concerns about global energy supply.
